description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: test and check. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions from 3.8 to 3.12, installing dependencies and running tox with various environments. The check job also runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of tox jobs including mypy, docs, linters, and twinecheck, using Python 3.12.
